title: MANGANGE Liliths Broken Heart and Gendos Perversion
display_title: MANGANGE Liliths Broken Heart and Gendos Perversion
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA][NGE] Lilith's Broken Heart and Gendo's Perversion             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Feb 21, 2009 2:29 pm Don't shoot if this was brought up already. I have a question about certain things in volume 11 of Sadamoto's Evangelion manga and from stage 78. In volume 11 chapter, stage 75, Gendo and Fuyutsuki are talking about how even if Kaworu made contact with Lilith, Seele's plan wouldn't have been realized because one thing is missing: Lilith's broken heart. In another translation it is 'Lilith's imperfect heart.' If one goes by the first translation, the meaning behind the line isn't very clear at first. But with the second translation, I'm wondering if Gendo is saying that Lilith (the one in central dogma, not Rei) is imperfect because she lacks her soul. Or does the line mean something else? They couldn't be talking about Rei, right? Also, in stage 79 Gendo pulls off his glove and reveals an eye (Adam) on his palm. He then says something strange that I don't understand (or I should really say "Are you thinking what I'm thinking?") It isn't Sadamoto's style to write something in reference to 'that.' Maybe there is an obvious answer that has nothing to do with 'that.' Did I do something evil by posting these pictures?

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Sun Feb 22, 2009 2:13 am Judging by the fact that there's a prominent picture of Her Rei-ness in the frame where that dialogue is spoken, I'd assume that they were definitely referring to her. I think it may have something to do with Rei carrying Lillith's soul and how that is a key component of their plan. I'm just a layman though. As for the scene with Gendo I just don't know. I'd analyze it some more but my copy is currently lent out.

[]: adam             Quote Post by Taiga_Shinjiro » Sun Mar 22, 2009 10:36 am In the manga Gendo *swallows adam, doesn't he?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Mar 22, 2009 12:14 pm That he does. Whole! And without even a glass of water to wash it down with. I wonder what Adam tastes like?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Mar 22, 2009 12:53 pm chicken? angel food cake? no thats zeruel. dead baby

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Mar 22, 2009 6:05 pm "Giant of Light" Adam or Gendo hand Adam? I'm pretty sure "Giant of Light" tastes kind of spicy while Gendo hand Adam taste like a meatball with jelly on the inside.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji1414 » Sat Apr 11, 2009 12:33 am Stage 79??, is already out?, i think you are referreing to stage 78

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Apr 11, 2009 10:14 am shinji1414 wrote: Stage 79??, is already out?, i think you are referreing to stage 78
